zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Ridge於1452年出生在英國戴文。她於1471年與Henry Butterworth在英國英格蘭多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年在英國英格蘭戴文享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a ridge, Middle English rigge (Old English hrycg) ‘ridge’, or a habitational name from any of the minor places so named. It is synonymous with West Midlands Rudge and northern Rigg . The surname is also fairly common in Ireland, in County Galway, having been taken to Connacht in the early 17th century. The name is sometimes Gaelicized as Mac Iomaire; iomaire being modern Irish for ‘ridge’. Compare Attridge .
sometimes perhaps a variant of   Rich   with voicing of the formerly medial consonant.

variants.name: Rigg
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the many minor placenames in northern England named with Middle English rigg (Old Norse hryggr) ‘ridge’. Compare the synonymous Ridge .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names based on the element rīc ‘power(ful)’. This surname is very rare in Germany.
Altered form of Swiss German Rüegg (see Ruegg ).

variants.name: Ridges
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): variant of Ridge , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Ridge was born in 1452, in Devon, England. She married Henry Butterworth in 1471, in Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1507, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ridgeは1452年にイギリスデボンで生まれた。1471年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブラドフォード ペバーエルでHenry Butterworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年にイギリスイギリスデボンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ridge(은)는 1452년 영국 데폰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브래드퍼드 p에버에서 Henry Butterworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Ridge родилась в 1452 г. в местности девон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Butterworth в 1471 г. в местности брадфорд пивирэлл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1507 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
